name: Taco Bell Green Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Husk the tomatillos and cut them in half.
2. Stem and halve the jalapeno peppers.
3. Boil the tomatillos and peppers in chicken broth for 10 minutes.
4. Strain, reserving the broth.
5. Combine the tomatillos, peppers, onion, garlic, cilantro, and remaining ingredients (except oil) in a blender. Mix until almost smooth.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan until very hot.
7. Add the tomatillo mixture and cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring constantly until dark and thick.
8. Add the reserved broth to the mixture and bring to a boil.
9. Reduce heat and continue cooking until thickened, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
